data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an approval workflow for high-value bookings. However, the evidence provided does not include any confirmation that such a workflow exists or has been tested. The linked use case explicitly states the need for an approval workflow, but there is no evidence of its implementation or validation, indicating a clear gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of an approval workflow for high-value bookings.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
